summary: Iteration 3 (E5 conformity) testing via public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Backend: 8/8 new pytest tests pass (profil GET/POST, attestations GET/upload/serve/delete, competences with sous_competences+indicateurs, realisations with categorie/periode/contribution/travail_equipe). Frontend: all new sections + testids present, synthese table OK with C1.1..C1.6 columns, edit-mode toggle reveals all edit-only buttons, profile edit-save-display flow works end-to-end, attestation annee1 upload works (file served via /uploads/attestations/). However ONE CRITICAL backend bug breaks add-realisation: POST /api/realisations without explicit `categorie` returns 500 'Column categorie cannot be null'. Two MEDIUM UX gaps: edit-profil panel only exposes 3 of 6 profile fields; attestation upload panel only exposes the file input (no titre/organisme/periode).

critical.issue: Returns HTTP 500 'SQLSTATE[23000] Column categorie cannot be null' when payload omits `categorie`. Root cause in /app/modeles/RealisationModele.php (creer() and modifier()): ternary `in_array(($d['categorie'] ?? 'formation'), [...], true) ? $d['categorie'] : 'formation'`. When the key is absent, the in_array check passes (thanks to ??), but the truthy branch reads $d['categorie'] which is undefined => NULL is bound. Fix: replace `? $d['categorie'] :` by `? ($d['categorie'] ?? 'formation') :` in BOTH creer() (line ~46) and modifier() (line ~71). Frontend `add-realisation` button calls this without categorie => add-realisation flow is COMPLETELY BROKEN on the public URL.

minor.issue: `sections` count is now 9 (added profil/synthese/attestations rows) but the older test_get_data_structure in backend_test.py still asserts 6. Pre-existing regression test needs updating to 9 or to filter by code.
Same as iter1: deleted files return HTTP 200 with index.php HTML because /app/public/router.php falls through. Should return 404.

ui_bugs.issue: Panel only renders 3 inputs (edit-profil-nom, edit-profil-prenom, edit-profil-option). Missing inputs for numero_candidat, session, etablissement -- yet the profile card displays these slots and the backend persists them. User cannot edit these via UI.

Panel only has the file input (att-file-annee1) + save button. No UI inputs for titre / organisme / periode_debut / periode_fin, although the backend accepts them via $_POST. After upload, the card displays '—' for the missing fields.

Console warning 'Impossible de charger les compétences — TypeError: Failed to fetch' fires on first page load (race between DOMContentLoaded and proxy availability). The page still renders correctly thanks to the server-side render; recommend retrying the fetch or wrapping in a small timeout.

integration_issues.issue: Triggers POST /api/realisations -> 500. Page error toast 'API /api/realisations -> 500' surfaces. The card is never appended to data-testid='realisations-formation'. Caused by the backend bug above.

action_items: FIX (1 line, critical): in /app/modeles/RealisationModele.php replace `? $d['categorie'] : 'formation'` by `? ($d['categorie'] ?? 'formation') : 'formation'` in both creer() and modifier(). This unblocks the 'Ajouter une réalisation' flow on the public URL.
Add the 3 missing inputs in the profile edit panel (numero_candidat, session, etablissement) in /app/vues/accueil.php + /app/js/editeur.js so the user can fill the full E5 candidate identification.
Add titre / organisme / periode_debut / periode_fin inputs in the attestation upload panel for both annee1 and annee2 (backend already supports them).
Update the legacy assertion in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py::test_get_data_structure (sections now == 9, not 6).
Optional: harden initial fetch in /app/js/editeur.js (retry once on TypeError: Failed to fetch) and return 404 in /app/public/router.php for missing /uploads/*.
critical_code_review_comments: RealisationModele.php creer()/modifier() ternary is a classic null-coalescing trap. Same pattern should be applied defensively to other whitelisted enums.
ApiControleur::uploadAttestation reads $_POST['titre']/'organisme'/'periode_*' but the frontend never sends them — UI is incomplete relative to the backend contract.
editeur.js charges les compétences via fetch() au DOMContentLoaded, mais ne réessaie pas en cas d'échec réseau — confusing first-paint UX.

success_rate.backend: 100% on new iter3 endpoints (8/8). Critical creer() bug only triggers when categorie is omitted (e.g. from add-realisation UI).
success_rate.frontend: Sections/testids 100%, profil edit/save 100%, attestation upload 100%, add-realisation 0% (blocked by backend bug).

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed transient data (realisations, attestation file) and clean up after themselves. Profile is reset to blanks at end of UI test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes RealisationModele.php categorie default, re-run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://sio-careerpad.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_e5_iteration3.py -v (should stay 8/8) and also verify add-realisation Playwright flow: toggle edit -> click [data-testid=add-realisation] -> a card appears in [data-testid=realisations-formation]. Then click edit-realisation-{id}, change categorie to pro_annee1, fill periode_debut/periode_fin/contribution, save, and check the card moves to [data-testid=realisations-pro_annee1] and a row appears in [data-testid=tableau-synthese]. Watch out: edit-profil panel exposes only 3 fields (use edit-profil-nom/prenom/option testids, not profil-*-input).
